query:
SELECT 
  cnj,
  status_resumido,
  status_original,
  advogado,
  raw_payload
FROM processos
WHERE raw_payload IS NOT NULL
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1;
